utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each item is fully specified with provider, coverage details, and cost (monthly and annual) where applicable. The total_budget is also specified with monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 items are included and fully detailed according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main providers: ExecutiveGlobal / PrimeCare for health coverage, PrimeHome for property coverage, PrimeTravel for travel coverage, and ExecutiveGlobal for additional services. From the ground-truth ratings: (1) 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' appears as a health plan with rating 10 for both physical and mental health. (2) 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection has a rating of 10. (3) 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage has a rating of 10. (4) 'ExecutiveGlobal' additional services correspond to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (monthly €20 option) under general_services, which has a rating of 10. Thus, each selected item in the AI’s plan maps to these ratings.
